project_type: Tauri v2 + React 19 + Vite 7 + TypeScript desktop application
build_system: npm + Vite for frontend, Tauri CLI for full build
test_framework: No test framework configured for the frontend
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npm run typecheck to verify TypeScript compiles. 3. Run npm run frontend:build to verify Vite build succeeds.
environment_constraints: Node.js v22.22.3 and npm 11.4.2 are available. No Rust toolchain needed for frontend-only validation. Network appears available for npm install.
contribution_requirements: From AGENTS.md: companion frontend changes must pass 'npm run build' (full Tauri build) or at minimum 'npm run frontend:build' (Vite build). From steering: communicate in Chinese, code comments can be in English.
key_patterns: All UI code is in a single file src/main.tsx. The app uses functional React components with hooks. State is managed with useState. The app has a sidebar navigation with views: device, voice, flash, logs. There is a Panel component for content sections. No existing i18n infrastructure.
directory_structure: companion/ - Tauri desktop app root. companion/src/ - Frontend source (main.tsx, styles.css, voice-overlay.ts). companion/src-tauri/ - Rust backend. companion/public/ - Static assets.
